utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each one is fully specified with all relevant details: (1) property includes the selected property, type, size, price, and notes; (2) financing includes lender, approved amount, down payment, term, interest rate, monthly payment, and conditions; (3) legal_services includes provider, list of services, and cost estimate; (4) moving_services includes provider, scope, and cost estimate; (5) setup_services includes detailed utility/internet setup and costs; (6) total_budget includes a cost breakdown with all major components and totals. All items are present and detailed as required.
